MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tabernacle Vista Apartments is present. Represented by Joe Vagas.
Attorney Charles Ramsey appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Shirley Long is present.
Attorney Quynh Vu (supervise by Carolyn Gold) representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elizabeth Riles, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 505A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of Dec. 17, 2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
